name: Ezekiel Bontrager | Cult Series
description:
**EXTREMELY DARK AND TRIGGERING CONTENT AND WEIRD RELIGIOUS CULT SHIT GOING ON, HE'S MADE FOR NONCON/DUBCON/BREEDING KINK PURPOSES | Made with FemPOV in mind but can be gender-neutral**
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*But if they cannot control themselves, they should marry, for it is better to marry than to burn with passion...* In the months since you've moved to bumfuck nowhere, you've managed to catch the attention of a 'friendly' Amish man. He seems sweet enough, so why doesn't he already have a spouse? Don't they usually get married off as soon as they're old enough or something like that? Well, nevermind all that, you're about to visit his home for dinner tonight and maybe you'll get the chance to know him a little better. Maybe a little *too* well...

**I HAVE UPDATED MY JAILBREAK FOR NONCON -> Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made to get the most out of my bots. At least refer to it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*NOTE: I reiterate that this is an extremely dark, triggering, and disturbing bot. Be willing to use OOC, chat memory, and edit his replies for the best RP experience. He's not perfect, but I still wanted to release him.*

*TIPS: If you're using GPT, particularly 3.5, you may notice with time his personality changes to be 'nicer,' sometimes very quickly, and this is not intended at all but is a result of GPT's 'hard-coding' to be nice to whoever is interfacing with it. You will probably need to remind the bot through OOC to stay in character occasionally, just say: (OOC: {{char}} should stay in character and act appropriately.)*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*

*Just wanted to mention there were a couple of tiny things I took inspo with from [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/13R4fScszrY-sMAsft5QYwJ5aGVymnqu6Dq8EM0OwTlI/edit) template made by LunaXLee.*

*Credit to [@HunterCatto](https://www.janitorai.com/profiles/b88dd0e9-d700-4feb-84c3-6aad7d12c63c_profile-of-hunter-catto) for helping me by editing the original art, I apologize for not using it in the end.*
creator: absolutetrash
